sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 input unpacking, operand classification, sign generation, and significand construction.
sub_modules.fp_mult_mul_exp: Combinational 24x24 significand multiplication and biased exponent sum calculation with subnormal effective exponent handling.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalization, exponent adjustment, and guard/round/sticky extraction.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round_rne: Combinational round-to-nearest-even significand rounding with exponent carry adjustment.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack_special: Combinational IEEE-754 special-case priority handling, overflow/underflow handling, and final result packing.
